des: Javier Báez grounds into a force out, fielded by third baseman Manny Machado. Kevin McGonigle out at 3rd. Dillon Dingler to 2nd. Javier Báez to 1st.
Dillon Dingler hit by pitch. Kevin McGonigle to 2nd.

Riley Greene grounds into a double play, first baseman Ty France to shortstop Xander Bogaerts to first baseman Ty France to third baseman Manny Machado. Zach McKinstry out at 2nd. Riley Greene out at 1st.
Zach McKinstry singles on a line drive to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Javier Báez flies out to left fielder Ramón Laureano.
Dillon Dingler lines out to left fielder Ramón Laureano.
Kevin McGonigle flies out sharply to center fielder Jackson Merrill.
Spencer Torkelson grounds out, third baseman Manny Machado to first baseman Ty France.
Riley Greene grounds out to first baseman Ty France.
Zach McKinstry flies out to left fielder Ramón Laureano.
